(born January 28, 1957, in [Boston](/wiki/Boston "Boston"), [Massachusetts](/wiki/Massachusetts "Massachusetts"), United States) is an American saxophone and [woodwind](/wiki/Woodwind_instrument "Woodwind instrument") player. He has worked with such artists as [John Williams](/wiki/John_Williams "John Williams"), [Seth MacFarlane](/wiki/Seth_MacFarlane "Seth MacFarlane"), [Aerosmith](/wiki/Aerosmith "Aerosmith"), [Stevie Wonder](/wiki/Stevie_Wonder "Stevie Wonder"), [Neil Diamond](/wiki/Neil_Diamond "Neil Diamond"), [Al Jarreau](/wiki/Al_Jarreau "Al Jarreau"), [Maroon 5](/wiki/Maroon_5 "Maroon 5"), [Kenny Loggins](/wiki/Kenny_Loggins "Kenny Loggins"), [Barry Manilow](/wiki/Barry_Manilow "Barry Manilow"), [Elton John](/wiki/Elton_John "Elton John"), [Go West](/wiki/Go_West_(band) "Go West (band)"), [The Temptations](/wiki/The_Temptations "The Temptations"), [Lionel Richie](/wiki/Lionel_Richie "Lionel Richie"), [Joe Cocker](/wiki/Joe_Cocker "Joe Cocker"), [Luis Miguel](/wiki/Luis_Miguel "Luis Miguel"), [Lisa Stansfield](/wiki/Lisa_Stansfield "Lisa Stansfield"), and [Eros Ramazzotti](/wiki/Eros_Ramazzotti "Eros Ramazzotti"). He has over 800 motion picture soundtracks to his credit. He is also known as the saxophone sound of [Bleeding Gums Murphy](/wiki/Bleeding_Gums_Murphy "Bleeding Gums Murphy") from *[The Simpsons](/wiki/The_Simpsons "The Simpsons")*.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

American saxophone and woodwind player (born 1955)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This [biography of a living person](/wiki/Wikipedia:Biographies_of_living_persons "Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons") **needs additional [citations](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citing_sources "Wikipedia:Citing sources") for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help by adding [reliable sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Reliable_sources "Wikipedia:Reliable sources"). [Contentious material](/wiki/Wikipedia:Biographies_of_living_persons#Remove_contentious_material_that_is_unsourced_or_poorly_sourced "Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons") about living persons that is unsourced or [poorly sourced](/wiki/Wikipedia:Reliable_sources#Questionable_and_self-published_sources "Wikipedia:Reliable sources") **must be removed immediately** from the article and its talk page, especially if potentially [libelous](/wiki/Wikipedia:Libel "Wikipedia:Libel"). *Find sources:* ["Dan Higgins"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Dan+Higgins%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Dan+Higgins%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Dan+Higgins%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Dan+Higgins%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Dan+Higgins%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Dan+Higgins%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(August 2023)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

**Dan Higgins** (born January 28, 1957, in [Boston](/wiki/Boston "Boston"), [Massachusetts](/wiki/Massachusetts "Massachusetts"), United States) is an American saxophone and [woodwind](/wiki/Woodwind_instrument "Woodwind instrument") player. He has worked with such artists as [John Williams](/wiki/John_Williams "John Williams"), [Seth MacFarlane](/wiki/Seth_MacFarlane "Seth MacFarlane"), [Aerosmith](/wiki/Aerosmith "Aerosmith"), [Stevie Wonder](/wiki/Stevie_Wonder "Stevie Wonder"), [Neil Diamond](/wiki/Neil_Diamond "Neil Diamond"), [Al Jarreau](/wiki/Al_Jarreau "Al Jarreau"), [Maroon 5](/wiki/Maroon_5 "Maroon 5"), [Kenny Loggins](/wiki/Kenny_Loggins "Kenny Loggins"), [Barry Manilow](/wiki/Barry_Manilow "Barry Manilow"), [Elton John](/wiki/Elton_John "Elton John"), [Go West](/wiki/Go_West_(band) "Go West (band)"), [The Temptations](/wiki/The_Temptations "The Temptations"), [Lionel Richie](/wiki/Lionel_Richie "Lionel Richie"), [Joe Cocker](/wiki/Joe_Cocker "Joe Cocker"), [Luis Miguel](/wiki/Luis_Miguel "Luis Miguel"), [Lisa Stansfield](/wiki/Lisa_Stansfield "Lisa Stansfield"), and [Eros Ramazzotti](/wiki/Eros_Ramazzotti "Eros Ramazzotti"). He has over 800 motion picture soundtracks to his credit. He is also known as the saxophone sound of [Bleeding Gums Murphy](/wiki/Bleeding_Gums_Murphy "Bleeding Gums Murphy") from *[The Simpsons](/wiki/The_Simpsons "The Simpsons")*.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

Higgins graduated from [North Texas State University](/wiki/University_of_North_Texas "University of North Texas").
